Fields.Name: Logic ID
Fields.Description: Set the ID of the logic created by the script.

Fields.Name: Battle Goal ID
Fields.Description: Battle goal ID

Fields.Name: Near Distance
Fields.Description: This is the range that is considered short distance. Used for determining close combat.

Fields.Name: Middle Distance
Fields.Description: This range is considered medium distance. Used to judge medium-range combat.

Fields.Name: Far Distance
Fields.Description: This is the range that is considered long distance. Used to judge projectiles.

Fields.Name: Out of Combat Distance
Fields.Description: This is the distance considered to be outside the combat range. Will no longer attempt to perform combat actions on enemies outside of range.

Fields.Name: Back Home Time on Touching Enemy Wall
Fields.Description: The life of the BackToHome goal when it touches an enemy wall that blocks the block

Fields.Name: Blocked Movement - Anim ID
Fields.Description: An action that automatically takes place when a destructible object stops it.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Action Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID (EzStateAnimID) when responding

Fields.Name: Call Help - Call Action ID
Fields.Description: Action ID (EzStateAnimID) when calling a friend

Fields.Name: Vision - Search Distance
Fields.Description: Visual enemy search range.

Fields.Name: Listen - Search Distance
Fields.Description: Enemy search range by hearing.

Fields.Name: Listen - Sound Cutoff Distance
Fields.Description: The distance to reduce the size of the sound source. You will not hear any sound below this distance.

Fields.Name: Sense - Distance
Fields.Description: Search range by smell.

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Max Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Battle Distance
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Combat - Non-Battle Act Duration
Fields.Description: COMMON_SetBattleActLogic argument

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Look for Target Time
Fields.Description: When returning home: Time to look at the target [sec]

Fields.Name: Retreat Home - Look for Target Distance
Fields.Description: When returning home: Distance to see the target [m]

Fields.Name: Vision - Target Visual Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time to forget the visual target.

Fields.Name: Listen - Target Forget Time
Fields.Description: Time to forget the sound target.

Fields.Name: Call Help - My Peer ID
Fields.Description: My fellow group ID

Fields.Name: Call Help - Call Peer ID
Fields.Description: Companion group ID to call a companion

Fields.Name: Target System - Damage Effect Rate
Fields.Description: Damage impact rate acquisition (target system evaluation information)

Fields.Name: Team Attack Effectivity
Fields.Description: A value for determining the number of simultaneous attacks in a team. Increasing the value reduces the number of people who can participate in the attack at the same time.

Fields.Name: Vision - Height Angle
Fields.Description: Visual search range.

Fields.Name: Vision - Width Angle
Fields.Description: Visual search range.

Fields.Name: Listen - Height Angle
Fields.Description: Hearing search range.

Fields.Name: Listen - Width Angle
Fields.Description: Hearing search range.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Valid Target Min Distance
Fields.Description: If it is closer than this value, you cannot call a friend.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Valid Target Range
Fields.Description: Do not call if the companion is farther than this value.

Fields.Name: Call Help - Forget Time by Arrival
Fields.Description: Time to respond

Fields.Name: Call Help - Min Wait Time
Fields.Description: Minimum time for the first wait goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

Fields.Name: Call Help - Max Wait Time
Fields.Description: Maximum time for the first waiting goal of the response goal [101 => 10.1sec]

Fields.Name: Goal Action - To Alert (Sound)
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to normal sound detection

Fields.Name: Goal Action - To Search (Sound)
Fields.Description: Goal action: Target becomes alert due to normal sound detection

Fields.Name: Call Help - Reply Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Action type to target position after response

Fields.Name: Disable Path Move
Fields.Description: Whether to move directly without following the path even if a path move command comes

Fields.Name: Skip Arrival Visibility Check
Fields.Description: Do you want to skip the arrival judgment by the line of sight? When set to On, arrival judgment is performed even if the line of sight does not pass.

Fields.Name: Think Attribute - Do Admirer
Fields.Description: Thinking attribute: When turned on, it plays a role of surrounding.

Fields.Name: Navigation - Edge
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node cliff? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Large Space
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node wide? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Ladder
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node ladder? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Hole
Fields.Description: Can you go through the node hole? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Door
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node door? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Ignore Navmesh Wall
Fields.Description: Can you pass through the node in the wall? (def: 0)

Fields.Name: Navigation - Cliff Edge
Fields.Description: Can you pass the node cliff under normal / alert conditions? (def: 1)

Fields.Name: Combat - Start Distance - In Total Darkness
Platoon - Reply Time
Fields.Description: Platoon reaction delay time [sec]

Fields.Name: Platoon - Reply Add Random Time
Fields.Description: Platoon reaction additional random time [sec]

Fields.Name: Vision - Start Position - Backward Offset
Fields.Description: The viewing angle start position is behind this distance from the center of the character.

Fields.Name: Vision - Start Distance
Fields.Description: This distance is not recognized from the viewing angle generation position

Fields.Name: Goal Action - Target Lost
Fields.Description: Goal action: Lost target

Fields.Name: Disable Local Steering
Fields.Description: Do you want to turn off the behavior (local steering) that tries to move while avoiding other characters?

Fields.Name: Act Type on Failed Path
Fields.Description: Default action type to be performed when the path search fails, when the end point of the alternative path is reached / when the homecoming limit distance is reached

Fields.Name: Goal Action: Start Alert State (Interesting Sound)
Goal Action: Start Normal State
Fields.Description: Action when transitioning to the normal state
